nasb.text: Thus I will make lewdness cease from the land, that all women may be admonished and not commit lewdness as you have done.

esv.text: Thus will I put an end to lewdness in the land, that all women may take warning and not commit lewdness as you have done.

cnv.text: 這樣，我必使淫蕩從這地止息，好叫所有的婦人都受到警戒，不敢照著你們的淫蕩而行。

ccb.text: 这样，我便制止了这地方的淫乱，所有的妇女都引以为戒，不敢效法她们。
